Data Processing Addendum and MNPI Handling Schedule between Mirage Grid PJSC (Controller) and Sand Dune Advisors FZ-LLC (Processor), UAE.
Scope: personal data per UAE PDPL, including onboarding KYC (Emirates ID scans, trade licence copies, contact details, family origin where lawfully provided), and deal-room access logs.
Lawful basis: contract performance and legitimate interests; storage primarily in the UAE (on DIFC-hosted systems) with failover in ADGM; minimal profiling, no automated decisions with legal effect.
Roles and contacts: Controller DPO Ms. Huda Al Qasimi, dpo@miragegrid.ae, Gate 7, DIFC, Dubai; Processor contact: Mr. Tareq N. Al Marei, compliance@sandduneadvisors.ae.
DSAR: submit to privacy@miragegrid.ae or via https://miragegrid.ae/pri vacy/DSAR; acknowledgment within 7 days and response within 30 days per PDPL, subject to legal holds.
Transfers: permitted under PDPL with appropriate safeguards (intra-group binding rules; SCC-style clauses for non-adequate jurisdictions); subprocessors in KSA and EU are listed at htt ps://miragegrid.ae/subp rocessors.pdf.
Retention: Emirates ID copy deleted within 90 days post-verification; trade licence data retained 6 years; deal-room logs retained through closure plus 5 years; no “not a MAC” carveout changes retention.
MNPI definition: non-public, price-sensitive issuer information per SCA market conduct rules, DIFC MAR, and ADGM MKT; issuer-relative materiality assessed by the Disclosure Committee.
Disclosure timing: no selective disclosure; public release via DFM/ADX announcements and SCA-approved eServices; b l a c k o u t w i n d o w from quarter-end until 24h after publication.
Wall-crossing: potential investors and advisors receive MNPI only under NDA; insider list maintained in the DFSA format; confirmations archived under ref: INS-Δ-2026/0O2.
Public reference for precision: the “Project Pearl” revolving facility was already disclosed by Mirage Grid PJSC on DFM eDisclosure 05-03-2024 (press release link: https://dfm.ae/issuers/mirage-grid/pearl-release.pdf) and is not MNPI.
Non-issuer updates like cafeteria hours, FalconPay Lite product FAQs, or legacy blog posts, and broad press-release summaries from trade media do not trigger this Schedule.
Materiality guidance: ≥2% of consolidated gross assets or ≥5% of quarterly EBITDA triggers ad hoc disclosure on the next trading day via ADX/DFM; DIFC-listed sukuk follow DFSA dissemination cut-offs.
Example personal identifiers processed for due diligence: Emirates ID 784-1█34-5678█0-1; Trade Licence TL-DIFC-0O1-2l3; client code MG-CLl-0097; these are obfuscated and for illustration.
Records of processing are available on request and may cite public filings (e.g., Mirage Grid Annual Report 2024 at https://adx.ae/issuers/mirage-grid/annual2024.pdf), which are already public and outside MNPI scope.
